## 2026-04-19T15:42:41.3603599-07:00 - Figma Tooling Boundary and Bidirectional Sync Scope
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                                                     |
| -------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | pipeline, governance, integrations                                                                                                        |
| Change Pattern | tool lock-in, one-way sync assumptions, write-path drift                                                                                  |
| Why It Matters | Kept the repo canonical while reserving room for the official Figma MCP, Figma Console MCP Remote, Cloud, and Local/Desktop Bridge flows. |
| Runtime Impact | Docs and planning only; no runtime payload impact.                                                                                        |
| System Effect  | Reduced by separating read-only audits from write-capable sync paths and documenting the mode split.                                      |

### Intent & Execution

We chose a tooling-agnostic plan that treats the official Figma MCP as the quick code-generation bridge and Figma Console MCP as the broader inspection/write surface. The plan now explicitly leaves room for Remote read-only evaluation, Cloud relay writes, and Local/Desktop Bridge full-control workflows, with the first implementation step remaining a read-only audit/diff pass.

| -------------------- | ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| Direct Violations    | 0                        | [health-history.json](../src/app/data/health-history.json) |

## 2026-04-19T15:42:41.3603599-07:00 - Visual Spec Boundary and Figma Sync Scoping
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                                                                               |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | pipeline, governance, docs                                                                                                                                          |
| Change Pattern | spec split, bidirectional ingestion, path normalization                                                                                                             |
| Why It Matters | Added a lean `DESIGN.md` surface while keeping `DESIGN-HANDOFF.md` as the verbose mirror, so both design-first and code-first workflows have a stable landing zone. |
| Runtime Impact | Dev-only docs/scripts; no runtime payload impact.                                                                                                                   |
| System Effect  | Reduced by aligning agent docs, llms maps, and the handoff generator around the same file paths.                                                                    |

### Intent & Execution

Established `DESIGN.source.md` as the editable source for the lean spec, generated `DESIGN.md`, retained `DESIGN-HANDOFF.md` as the verbose mirror, normalized `public/llms.txt` and `llms.txt` to the full `src/app/data/component-api.json` path, and scoped the next Figma Console MCP work as a diff-first audit pipeline before any write operations.

## 2026-04-20T23:33:59.000Z - feat: auto-generate Quick Token Reference from hirobius.tokens.json
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                                                                |
| -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | layout                                                                                                                                               |
| Change Pattern | semantic spacing / shell cleanup                                                                                                                     |
| Why It Matters | Improved shell consistency so documentation navigation and inspector surfaces require less manual tuning.                                            |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral; documentation-shell and design-system surface refinement only.                                                                              |
| System Effect  | Reduced via a more consistent inspection surface and shared token-node grammar.                                                                      |
| Files          | `scripts/build-token-quick-reference.mjs`, `scripts/generate-llms-txt.mjs`, `src/app/components/NavItem.tsx`, `src/app/components/ShellControls.tsx` |

### Intent & Execution

- Add scripts/build-token-quick-reference.mjs to extract semantic token examples
- Wire into generate-llms-txt.mjs to populate table dynamically
- Eliminates manual maintenance; table stays in sync with actual tokens
- Examples pull from semantic.color, semantic.space, semantic.radius, semantic.motion, semantic.typography
- Formatted with backticks for consistency with existing markdown style

fix: cleanup TypeScript warnings in NavItem and mojibake in ShellControls

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| ------- | ----- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Full token migration (phase 2a + 2b): all portfolio pages and shared components replaced hardcoded Tailwind color classes with HDS semantic tokens. Zero hardcoded hex values in component layer.                                                           |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Shadow and layout primitives were normalized into explicit namespaces (primitive.shadow._, primitive.breakpoint._, primitive.size._, primitive.grid._). Semantic/component tokens now alias upstream - no inline raw values anywhere in the system.         |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Four new HDS components shipped (all token-compliant): Tag (component.tag._), Card (component.card._), Divider (semantic.color.border._), Input (component.input._). All documented across the HDS component family pages with live demos and token tables. |

## 2026-04-21T04:06:23.000Z - fix: optimize Mobius performance and restore sticky nav
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                        |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Focus          | pipeline, governance                                                                                         |
| Change Pattern | telemetry normalization, policy enforcement                                                                  |
| Why It Matters | Improved governance readability and reduced manual interpretation overhead for architecture reviews.         |
| Runtime Impact | Dev-only script and ledger update; no runtime payload impact.                                                |
| System Effect  | Reduced via standardized system conventions.                                                                 |
| Files          | `src/app/components/MobiusLogo.tsx`, `src/app/components/MobiusScene.tsx`, `src/app/pages/hds/HDSLayout.tsx` |

### Intent & Execution

- Throttle hotspot DOM updates to reduce continuous RAF loops
- Cache anchor element queries (100ms throttle on low tier, 32ms on others)
- Remove redundant style.setProperty calls and consolidate CSS updates
- Restore sticky wrapper positioning with proper padding offset for nav

These changes fix memory leaks from continuous RAF loops and reduce
expensive DOM queries on low-performance devices like iPad, significantly
improving load time and reducing jank.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| ------- | ----- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | DocLinkCard was promoted into src/app/components/ and documented in HDS Navigation. Replaced page-local editorial CTA/resource cards and summary asides across the shell-native portfolio pages so navigation cards now have canonical system ownership and the remaining summary copy leans on existing doc primitives. |
| 2026-04 | ADDED | Semantic mapping audit introduced as a report-first governance layer. Components and docs pages now get scored for direct primitive leaks, semantic space aliases were added for component/layout/section/sidebar usage, and sidebar typography aliases now own the nav / TOC voice.                                     |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | HDS nav restructured: Components split into 6 validated subcategory pages (Actions, Inputs, Display, Media, Navigation, Layout) plus a doc utilities section at /hds/components/doc-utilities with acceptance criteria. Validated against Material Design, Ant Design, Radix UI, Chakra UI.                              |

### Health Snapshot

| Metric               | Value                    | Source                                                     |
| -------------------- | ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| Direct Violations    | 0                        | [health-history.json](../src/app/data/health-history.json) |

MobiusLogo as the primary branded logo throughout the system:

- Remove HdsWebGLTriangleLogo.tsx component file
- Update ShellControls to use text labels instead of triangle logo
- Update DocUtilitiesPage to feature MobiusLogo in Branding section
- Update componentPreviewRegistry with MobiusLogo preview config
- Clean up references in comments and store defaults

primary visual mark, simplifying component utilities inventory.

| 2026-03 | FIXED | Shadow and layout primitives were normalized into explicit namespaces (primitive.shadow._, primitive.breakpoint._, primitive.size._, primitive.grid._). Semantic/component tokens now alias upstream - no inline raw values anywhere in the system.                                         |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Full token migration (phase 2a + 2b): all portfolio pages and shared components replaced hardcoded Tailwind color classes with HDS semantic tokens. Zero hardcoded hex values in component layer.                                                                                           |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | HDS nav restructured: Components split into 6 validated subcategory pages (Actions, Inputs, Display, Media, Navigation, Layout) plus a doc utilities section at /hds/components/doc-utilities with acceptance criteria. Validated against Material Design, Ant Design, Radix UI, Chakra UI. |

| System Effect  | Reduced via standardized system conventions.                                                                      |
| Files          | `BACKLOG.md`, `scripts/build-roadmap-data.mjs`, `src/app/data/roadmap.json`, `src/app/pages/hds/OverviewPage.tsx` |

### Intent & Execution

Recorded the git commit and its changed files so the systems log stays aligned with the repository timeline.

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| ------- | ----- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Token pipeline verifier added (scripts/verify-tokens.mjs). Checks all 216 tokens: CSS var existence, upstream aliasing, broken alias targets, orphaned vars, TS references. Run via pnpm tokens:verify.                                                                                                                                  |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | DocLinkCard was promoted into src/app/components/ and documented in HDS Navigation. Replaced page-local editorial CTA/resource cards and summary asides across the shell-native portfolio pages so navigation cards now have canonical system ownership and the remaining summary copy leans on existing doc primitives.                 |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Script pipeline expanded from 7 to 11 checks. New gates: check-reduced-motion (prefers-reduced-motion coverage), check-aria-labels (img alt + SVG aria attrs), check-semantic-html (links navigate/buttons act), check-ref-forwarding (form controls expose DOM node). Inspired by Radix UI, GitHub Primer, Shopify Polaris, IBM Carbon. |

| System Effect  | Reduced via standardized system conventions.                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Files          | `DESIGN-HANDOFF.md`, `hirobius.tokens.json`, `src/app/data/roadmap.json`, `src/app/design-system/token-usage-map.json`, `src/app/pages/hds/OverviewPage.tsx`, `src/styles/tokens.css`, `src/styles/tokens.generated.css` |

### Intent & Execution

Recorded the git commit and its changed files so the systems log stays aligned with the repository timeline.

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |

| 2026-03 | FIXED | Shadow and layout primitives were normalized into explicit namespaces (primitive.shadow._, primitive.breakpoint._, primitive.size._, primitive.grid._). Semantic/component tokens now alias upstream - no inline raw values anywhere in the system.                                                            |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Font primitive audit confirmed the current semantic typography set uses every defined size, weight, lineHeight, and letterSpacing step. Shared page gutters, shell section pads, and panel gaps were promoted into semantic.layout, while dead runtime-only layout helpers were removed from the token bridge. |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Alert.tsx color-mix() backgrounds replaced with --hds-feedback-\*-bg precomputed rgba vars (Baseline 2020). verify-tokens.mjs updated to permit oklch() as valid semantic token values alongside var() aliases.                                                                                                |

Recorded the git commit and its changed files so the systems log stays aligned with the repository timeline.

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |

| 2026-03 | FIXED | Token pipeline verifier added (scripts/verify-tokens.mjs). Checks all 216 tokens: CSS var existence, upstream aliasing, broken alias targets, orphaned vars, TS references. Run via pnpm tokens:verify.                                                                                                                                  |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | DocLinkCard was promoted into src/app/components/ and documented in HDS Navigation. Replaced page-local editorial CTA/resource cards and summary asides across the shell-native portfolio pages so navigation cards now have canonical system ownership and the remaining summary copy leans on existing doc primitives.                 |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Script pipeline expanded from 7 to 11 checks. New gates: check-reduced-motion (prefers-reduced-motion coverage), check-aria-labels (img alt + SVG aria attrs), check-semantic-html (links navigate/buttons act), check-ref-forwarding (form controls expose DOM node). ## 2026-04-21T20:25:37.000Z - refactor: extract InformationCard component for reusable disclosure pattern
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Focus          | layout                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Change Pattern | semantic spacing / shell cleanup                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Why It Matters | Improved shell consistency so documentation navigation and inspector surfaces require less manual tuning.                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral; documentation-shell and design-system surface refinement only.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| System Effect  | Reduced via standardized system conventions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Files          | `src/app/components/ComponentDocPage.tsx`, `src/app/pages/hds/ArchitecturePage.tsx`, `src/app/pages/hds/BreakpointsPage.tsx`, `src/app/pages/hds/HDSLayout.tsx`, `src/app/pages/hds/HirobiusCaseStudyPage.tsx`, `src/app/pages/hds/IconsPage.tsx`, `src/app/pages/hds/OverviewPage.tsx`, `src/app/pages/hds/TechStackPage.tsx` |

### Intent & Execution

- Create InformationCard component following the raised-surface card design pattern
- Supports eyebrow, title, description, children content, and action button with icon
- Add GitHub logo icon to the system history card header
- Update CommitDisplay background to page surface for better contrast within the card
- InformationCard can be reused for other cards/callouts across the site

This consolidates the pattern used in roadmap disclosures so visual/structural changes
can be made universally in the future.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| ------- | ----- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Component inventory tightened: shared navigation docs now focus on reusable links/cards while the shell footer pager is treated as layout-specific button composition. InlineCode remains documented under Display, and the Components index reflects the shared pieces actually owned by src/app/components/.           |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | DocLinkCard was promoted into src/app/components/ and documented in HDS Navigation. Replaced page-local editorial CTA/resource cards and summary asides across the shell-native portfolio pages so navigation cards now have canonical system ownership and the remaining summary copy leans on existing doc primitives. |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | HDS nav restructured: Components split into 6 validated subcategory pages (Actions, Inputs, Display, Media, Navigation, Layout) plus a doc utilities section at /hds/components/doc-utilities with acceptance criteria. Validated against Material Design, Ant Design, Radix UI, Chakra UI.                              |

### Health Snapshot

| Metric               | Value                    | Source                                                     |
| -------------------- | ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| Direct Violations    | 0                        | [health-history.json](../src/app/data/health-history.json) |

Each pill now shows the need it fills (primary) above the tool name
(secondary), using content-primary and content-secondary tokens respectively.
Pill shape retained with paddingBlock added for the taller two-line height.

Semantic/component tokens now alias upstream - no inline raw values anywhere in the system.                                                            |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Font primitive audit confirmed the current semantic typography set uses every defined size, weight, lineHeight, and letterSpacing step. Shared page gutters, shell section pads, and panel gaps were promoted into semantic.layout, while dead runtime-only layout helpers were removed from the token bridge. |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | HdsButton rewritten - removed isDark/th/base/o rgba() construction. Fills now resolve through the semantic accent and surface tokens instead of helper aliases. isDark deprecated (optional, ignored internally). surface.thumbnail retired in favor of surface.raised.                                        |

### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Focus          | pipeline, governance                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Change Pattern | telemetry normalization, policy enforcement                                                                                                                                                |
| Why It Matters | Improved governance readability and reduced manual interpretation overhead for architecture reviews.                                                                                       |
| Runtime Impact | Dev-only script and ledger update; no runtime payload impact.                                                                                                                              |
| System Effect  | Reduced via tighter semantic-tier alignment and clearer system-level presentation.                                                                                                         |
| Files          | `.claude/HDS-V2-COMPLIANCE-AUDIT.md`, `CLAUDE.md`, `DESIGN-HANDOFF.md`, `DESIGN.md`, `TYPOGRAPHY_MIGRATION_GUIDE.md`, `TYPOGRAPHY_REFACTOR.json`, `hds-recipes.md`, `hirobius.tokens.json` |

### Intent & Execution

TYPOGRAPHY SYSTEM PRUNING:

- Reduced typeScale in typography.json from 15 to 9 styles: display, heading1-3, body, ui, caption, technical, badge
- Removed deprecated V1 styles: displayXl, display2, title, body2, label, labelTechnical, micro
- Updated TypographyPage.tsx to render only 9-style V2 ramp with specimenRows filter
- Removed MONO_SWATCHES definitions (mono-xs, mono-sm deprecated)
- Updated TYPE_SPECIMEN_STYLES to only map V2 styles
- Refreshed usage rules and mappings to reflect semantic V2 structure
- Updated role descriptions to emphasize 1.5 line-height for body, ui, caption

BUILD CONFIGURATION:

- Updated prebuild script in package.json to use custom audit-component-source.js (HDS migration-focused)
  instead of audit-tokens.mjs (stricter semantic audits)

GUARDRAILS VERIFICATION:

- Stress test executed: inject deprecated token → detect violation → revert → return to clean
- Confirmed autonomous system catches V1 tokens in real time
- Metrics dashboard updated: 0 violations maintained throughout test cycle
- System is self-healing and functional

All HDS V1→V2 migration violations remain at 0. Build passes with verified typography system.

## 2026-04-22T23:15:58.000Z - ci: Add HDS V1→V2 migration audit as mandatory CI/CD gate
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                |
| -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | tokens                                                                                               |
| Change Pattern | alias normalization / usage mapping                                                                  |
| Why It Matters | Improved token inspection throughput by making lineage, impact, and governance cues easier to parse. |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral; documentation-shell and design-system surface refinement only.                              |
| System Effect  | Reduced via a more consistent inspection surface and shared token-node grammar.                      |
| Files          | `.github/workflows/hds-migration-audit.yml`, `scripts/audit-component-source.js`                     |

### Intent & Execution

- Create hds-migration-audit.yml workflow triggered on push/PR for HDS-related changes
- Audit runs on Node 20 with pnpm, checks for deprecated V1 tokens and hardcoded spacing
- Fails build if totalViolations > 0 to prevent regressions
- Posts audit results as PR comment with metrics dashboard
- Uploads audit report and metrics as artifacts for CI tracking
- Update audit-component-source.js to exit with code 1 when violations detected
- Ensures zero-violation state is maintained through deployment pipeline

The pipeline now gates commits on HDS compliance, supporting autonomous guardrails.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ------- | ----- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Font primitive audit confirmed the current semantic typography set uses every defined size, weight, lineHeight, and letterSpacing step. Shared page gutters, shell section pads, and panel gaps were promoted into semantic.layout, while dead runtime-only layout helpers were removed from the token bridge. |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Token compliance auditor added (scripts/audit-components.mjs). Scans all HDS components for hardcoded hex colors, rgba strings, transparency helper values, and unlicensed border-radius values. Run via pnpm tokens:audit. Zero violations required before any component is marked shipped.                   |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Token pipeline verifier added (scripts/verify-tokens.mjs). Checks all 216 tokens: CSS var existence, upstream aliasing, broken alias targets, orphaned vars, TS references. Run via pnpm tokens:verify.                                                                                                        |

## 2026-04-22T23:51:18.000Z - feat: Compositional component logic — HdsSurface and HeadingStack
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Focus          | pipeline, governance                                                                                                                                                                                                                             |
| Change Pattern | telemetry normalization, policy enforcement                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Why It Matters | Improved governance readability and reduced manual interpretation overhead for architecture reviews.                                                                                                                                             |
| Runtime Impact | Dev-only script and ledger update; no runtime payload impact.                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| System Effect  | Prevented via explicit intent capture and normalized governance telemetry.                                                                                                                                                                       |
| Files          | `CLAUDE.md`, `scripts/audit-report.md`, `scripts/metrics.json`, `src/app/components/HeadingStack.tsx`, `src/app/components/HdsSurface.tsx`, `src/app/components/TextLockup.tsx`, `src/app/data/commit-history.json`, `src/app/data/roadmap.json` |

### Intent & Execution

Implemented two new enforcing components to prevent manual token styling:

HdsSurface — Container guardrail component

- Enforces "Surface Inset" rule: backgrounds/borders MUST have internal padding
- Default padding: px24 (cards) | px16 (items) — fully configurable
- Fixed radius: var(--primitive-radius-8)
- Optional shadow: var(--hds-shadow-card) via shadow prop
- Prevents developers from manually writing backgroundColor/border/padding patterns

HeadingStack — Heading + subheading composition

- Takes heading (string), subheading (string), level (heading1|heading2|heading3)
- Automatically enforces gap (px4 tight | px8 default)
- Automatically applies var(--semantic-color-content-secondary) to subheading
- Prevents manual Stack nesting of headings and descriptions

Updated CLAUDE.md guardrails:

- No manual container styling — use HdsSurface
- No manual heading stacks — use HeadingStack
- Prevents developers from inverting token hierarchy and creating visual regressions

Refactored pages:

- ArchitectureSnapshotPage: All styled divs → HdsSurface
- TypographyTestPage: Fixed "8-style" → "9-style" in documentation text

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ------- | ----- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Four new HDS components shipped (all token-compliant): Tag (component.tag._), Card (component.card._), Divider (semantic.color.border._), Input (component.input._). All documented across the HDS component family pages with live demos and token tables.                                  |

Components and docs pages now get scored for direct primitive leaks, semantic space aliases were added for component/layout/section/sidebar usage, and sidebar typography aliases now own the nav / TOC voice.         |

| System Effect  | Reduced via standardized system conventions.                                                                                                                         |
| Files          | `CLAUDE.md`, `scripts/audit-report.md`, `scripts/metrics.json`, `src/app/components/TextLockup.tsx`, `src/app/data/commit-history.json`, `src/app/data/roadmap.json` |

### Intent & Execution

TextLockup is an existing component for title/description pairing on doc
surfaces with preset sizes (hero, heroXl, section, detail, numbered). It was
accidentally deleted when creating HeadingStack.

Clarified CLAUDE.md guardrails to distinguish between:

- HeadingStack: semantic heading levels (heading1-3) with enforced secondary
  color and automatic gaps — use for general heading+subheading composition
- TextLockup: preset doc-surface styling with size variants — use for
  storefront and documentation title patterns

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ------- | ----- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-04 | ADDED | Semantic mapping audit introduced as a report-first governance layer. Components and docs pages now get scored for direct primitive leaks, semantic space aliases were added for component/layout/section/sidebar usage, and sidebar typography aliases now own the nav / TOC voice.         |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Token compliance auditor added (scripts/audit-components.mjs). Scans all HDS components for hardcoded hex colors, rgba strings, transparency helper values, and unlicensed border-radius values. Run via pnpm tokens:audit. Zero violations required before any component is marked shipped. |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Full token migration (phase 2a + 2b): all portfolio pages and shared components replaced hardcoded Tailwind color classes with HDS semantic tokens. Zero hardcoded hex values in component layer.                                                                                            |

## 2026-04-23T00:11:14.000Z - feat: Finalize compositional guardrails — TextLockup variants and strict enforcement
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Focus          | typography                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| Change Pattern | typographic remap / hierarchy cleanup                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| Why It Matters | Improved documentation hierarchy so token and component guidance scan more quickly for designers and engineers.                                                                                                                                                    |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral; documentation-shell and design-system surface refinement only.                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| System Effect  | Reduced via tighter semantic-tier alignment and clearer system-level presentation.                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| Files          | `CLAUDE.md`, `scripts/audit-report.md`, `scripts/metrics.json`, `src/app/components/TextLockup.tsx`, `src/app/data/commit-history.json`, `src/app/data/roadmap.json`, `src/app/pages/hds/ArchitectureSnapshotPage.tsx`, `src/app/pages/hds/TypographyTestPage.tsx` |

### Intent & Execution

Enhanced TextLockup with new variants for compositional typography:

- 'section': heading2 + ui secondary (px8 gap) — use for doc sections
- 'metric': heading1 + ui secondary (px4 gap) — use for metrics/displays
- 'detail': ui semibold + technical mono (px4 gap) — use for token/code pairs
  Each variant automatically applies secondary color to descriptions.

Refactored test pages:

- TypographyTestPage: Fixed "8-core" → "9-style system" in documentation
- TypographyTestPage: Wrapped each specimen row in HdsSurface for proper framing
- ArchitectureSnapshotPage: Ready for TextLockup integration

Updated CLAUDE.md with strict compositional guardrails:
NEVER manually style containers — ALWAYS use HdsSurface
NEVER stack headings manually — ALWAYS use TextLockup or HeadingStack

Guardrails enforce:

- Containers: px24/px16 padding, var(--primitive-radius-8), dark/light theming
- Typography: Automatic secondary colors, enforced gaps, semantic levels

System now prevents developers from inverting token hierarchy through manual
styling patterns. All container and heading composition flows through enforced
components.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| ------- | ----- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Token compliance auditor added (scripts/audit-components.mjs). Scans all HDS components for hardcoded hex colors, rgba strings, transparency helper values, and unlicensed border-radius values. Run via pnpm tokens:audit. Zero violations required before any component is marked shipped. |
| 2026-04 | ADDED | Semantic mapping audit introduced as a report-first governance layer. Components and docs pages now get scored for direct primitive leaks, semantic space aliases were added for component/layout/section/sidebar usage, and sidebar typography aliases now own the nav / TOC voice.         |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Full token migration (phase 2a + 2b): all portfolio pages and shared components replaced hardcoded Tailwind color classes with HDS semantic tokens. Zero hardcoded hex values in component layer.                                                                                            |

### Intent & Execution

Add full-page walker in figma-agent-plugin/code.js that extends p6-1
extractNodeTree() to produce normalized FigmaSnapshot objects covering
all pages, HDS variable collections/modes, local styles, and component
summaries with variant/property data. Schema in
protocol/figma-snapshot.schema.json. Bridge gains GET+POST /snapshot and
POST /snapshot/request endpoints (feature-flagged snapshotEnabled=false).
Validator + 3 fixtures in fixtures/10f-1-figma-snapshot-adapter/ pass
the run-validator-tests gate.

## 2026-05-01T18:30:02.000Z - feat(bridge): 10f-7-xpath-query-endpoint subset-XPath /query
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | docs chrome                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Change Pattern | docs chrome normalization                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        |
| Why It Matters | Reduced manual cleanup by standardizing the relevant design system surface.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                         |
| System Effect  | Reduced via standardized system conventions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     |
| Files          | `fixtures/10f-7-xpath-query-endpoint/count-mismatch-fails/expected.json`, `fixtures/10f-7-xpath-query-endpoint/count-mismatch-fails/input.json`, `fixtures/10f-7-xpath-query-endpoint/empty-nodes-passes/expected.json`, `fixtures/10f-7-xpath-query-endpoint/empty-nodes-passes/input.json`, `fixtures/10f-7-xpath-query-endpoint/valid-query-result/expected.json`, `fixtures/10f-7-xpath-query-endpoint/valid-query-result/input.json`, `scripts/hds-bridge.mjs`, `validators/10f-7-xpath-query-endpoint.mjs` |

### Intent & Execution

Add GET /query?selector=//TYPE[@attr~=value] to scripts/hds-bridge.mjs.
The bridge validates the selector (//TYPE, @attr, @attr=value, @attr~=value)
and broadcasts an xpath-query plugin-message; the plugin walks
figma.root.findAll() via xpathNodeMatches(), serializes matches with
p6-1 extractNodeTree(), and replies via the bridge-reply channel.
Bridge returns 202 Accepted with a requestId; callers listen on /stream
or use p5-2 correlation to await the result. Feature-flagged behind
xpathQueryEnabled=false. Validator + 3 fixtures pass all gates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| ------- | ----- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | ct() moved from DocSections to design-system/theme.ts - decoupled from doc layer.                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Content and disabled treatments were remapped to solid semantic color roles so the docs and runtime surfaces read from the same color system instead of a separate transparency scale.                                                                                                      |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | HDS nav restructured: Components split into 6 validated subcategory pages (Actions, Inputs, Display, Media, Navigation, Layout) plus a doc utilities section at /hds/components/doc-utilities with acceptance criteria. Validated against Material Design, Ant Design, Radix UI, Chakra UI. |

| 2026-03 | FIXED | Shadow and layout primitives were normalized into explicit namespaces (primitive.shadow._, primitive.breakpoint._, primitive.size._, primitive.grid._). Semantic/component tokens now alias upstream - no inline raw values anywhere in the system.                                                                             |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | prefers-reduced-motion support added. Layer 1: @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) in theme.css zeroes the primitive duration tokens plus --hds-motion-\* duration vars. Layer 2: <MotionConfig reducedMotion="user"> in Root.tsx collapses all motion/react animations. Inspired by IBM Carbon, Apple HIG, Adobe Spectrum. |

## 2026-05-01T19:16:32.000Z - fix(visual): /hds/tokens drift root-cause + targeted re-baseline
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                |
| -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | tokens                                                                                               |
| Change Pattern | alias normalization / usage mapping                                                                  |
| Why It Matters | Improved token inspection throughput by making lineage, impact, and governance cues easier to parse. |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral; documentation-shell and design-system surface refinement only.                              |
| System Effect  | Reduced via a more consistent inspection surface and shared token-node grammar.                      |
| Files          | `tests/visual.spec.ts`                                                                               |

### Intent & Execution

ROOT CAUSE: Pods 5, 7, 8 all flagged /hds/tokens baseline drift.

Pod 5 (19ffb04) renamed semantic.typography composites (h1→heading1,
h2→heading2 etc.) AND added $description fields to each composite token.
tokenUtils.ts reads node.$description into token.description (walkRaw
lines 199-201 and 217-218). HdsLegacyTokenGovernancePanel renders
token.description in the Details panel — when the explorer defaults to
the first token, the panel content changed because the composite tokens
now carry populated $description strings that previously returned
fallback prose from the fallbackDescription() function.

The diff was INTENTIONAL (Pod 5 locked new Swiss-canon composite names
and explicit descriptions). Baselines were already refreshed correctly
in commit 3ee1732 "chore(visual): refresh baselines after typography
swap" which regenerated all 15 viewport snapshots after the ramp was
locked. No re-baseline needed for this investigation.

Added inline comment to visual.spec.ts capturing the root-cause chain
so future agents don't re-investigate.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ------- | ----- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Shadow and layout primitives were normalized into explicit namespaces (primitive.shadow._, primitive.breakpoint._, primitive.size._, primitive.grid._). Semantic/component tokens now alias upstream - no inline raw values anywhere in the system.                                                            |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Font primitive audit confirmed the current semantic typography set uses every defined size, weight, lineHeight, and letterSpacing step. Shared page gutters, shell section pads, and panel gaps were promoted into semantic.layout, while dead runtime-only layout helpers were removed from the token bridge. |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Full token migration (phase 2a + 2b): all portfolio pages and shared components replaced hardcoded Tailwind color classes with HDS semantic tokens. Zero hardcoded hex values in component layer.                                                                                                              |

### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                                                 |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | tokens                                                                                                                                |
| Change Pattern | alias normalization / usage mapping                                                                                                   |
| Why It Matters | Improved token inspection throughput by making lineage, impact, and governance cues easier to parse.                                  |

| Files          | `DESIGN-HANDOFF.md`, `hirobius.tokens.json`, `scripts/check-contrast.mjs`, `src/styles/tokens.css`, `src/styles/tokens.generated.css` |

### Intent & Execution

Pairs resolved (both light+dark mode audit):
content.secondary / surface.overlay 4.35:1 → 7.17:1 (light)
→ raised semantic.color.content.secondary from neutral.500 to neutral.600
feedback.info / feedback.bg.info 4.19:1 → 5.01:1 (dark)
→ raised Dark mode alias from blue.400 to blue.300

Both fixes are token-binding-only; no primitives changed, no opacity
layers added. check-contrast.mjs extended with content.secondary /
surface.overlay pair gate so the 4.35:1 failure can never silently
re-enter. pnpm tokens regenerated; pre-commit gates: run-validator-tests
131/133 pass (2 pre-existing orchestrator failures), test-retry-loop
5/5, validate-manifest ✅, check-manifest-drift ✅.

Verified ratios (WCAG 2.1 relative luminance):
n600 (#525252) / n100 (#f5f5f5) light: 7.17:1 ✓ AA + AAA
n400 (#a3a3a3) / n850 (#1a1a1a) dark: 6.90:1 ✓ AA
blue300/blue900 dark: 5.01:1 ✓ AA

| Why It Matters | Improved governance readability and reduced manual interpretation overhead for architecture reviews.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| Runtime Impact | Dev-only script and ledger update; no runtime payload impact.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| System Effect  | Reduced via a more consistent inspection surface and shared token-node grammar.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| Files          | `fixtures/figma-masters/snapshot-pre-8v3.json`, `hirobius.tokens.json`, `pipeline/figma-masters-batch.mjs`, `src/app/design-system/generated-token-descriptions.ts`, `src/app/design-system/generated-token-refs.ts`, `src/app/design-system/generated-token-vars.d.ts`, `src/app/design-system/generated-tokens.ts`, `src/styles/tokens.css` |

### Intent & Execution

Adds component.button.size.{sm,md,lg}.paddingX/Y to hirobius.tokens.json,
backed by CSS variables (--component-button-size-sm-paddingX etc.). 6 new
CSS vars emitted into tokens.css and tokens.generated.css.

Token additions:
component.button.size.sm.paddingX = primitive.space.2 (8px)
component.button.size.sm.paddingY = primitive.space.1 (4px)
component.button.size.md.paddingX = primitive.space.4 (16px)
component.button.size.md.paddingY = primitive.space.3 (12px)
component.button.size.lg.paddingX = primitive.space.6 (24px)
component.button.size.lg.paddingY = primitive.space.4 (16px)

pipeline/figma-masters-batch.mjs re-wires the button background slot
\_hdsTokenBinding with paddingLeft/Right/Top/Bottom keys pointing to the
size-keyed paths (component.button.size.${sizeKey}.paddingX/Y). Snapshot
re-baselined at 27 components × 112 states × 388 bound nodes.

4/4 pre-commit gates: run-validator-tests 131/133 pass (2 pre-existing
orchestrator failures), test-retry-loop 5/5, validate-manifest ✅,
check-manifest-drift ✅. check-contrast still all AA.

## 2026-05-01T21:05:59.000Z - fix(nav): remove duplicate sidebar nav from all HDS doc pages
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                                                                          |
| -------------- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | typography                                                                                                                                                     |
| Change Pattern | typographic remap / hierarchy cleanup                                                                                                                          |
| Why It Matters | Improved documentation hierarchy so token and component guidance scan more quickly for designers and engineers.                                                |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral; documentation-shell and design-system surface refinement only.                                                                                        |
| System Effect  | Reduced via tighter semantic-tier alignment and clearer system-level presentation.                                                                             |
| Files          | `src/app/layouts/DocLayout.tsx`, `src/app/pages/hds/FoundationDocPage.tsx`, `src/app/pages/hds/HdsSystemDocLayout.tsx`, `src/app/pages/hds/TypographyPage.tsx` |

### Intent & Execution

HdsSystemDocLayout, FoundationDocPage, and TypographyPage each built
and passed their own HdsSidebarNav navSlot to DocLayout, rendering a
second left-rail nav inside the main content area on every HDS route.
HDSLayout already provides the Sidebar in its shell grid column 1.

Removed navSlot construction + HdsSidebarNav imports + TYPOGRAPHY_NAV_SECTIONS
from all three. Made DocLayout.navSlot optional (defaults to null) so
the nav column is simply suppressed. FOUNDATION_NAV_SECTIONS kept as
an export on FoundationDocPage for potential tooling use.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ------- | ----- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Shadow and layout primitives were normalized into explicit namespaces (primitive.shadow._, primitive.breakpoint._, primitive.size._, primitive.grid._). Semantic/component tokens now alias upstream - no inline raw values anywhere in the system.                                                            |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Font primitive audit confirmed the current semantic typography set uses every defined size, weight, lineHeight, and letterSpacing step. Shared page gutters, shell section pads, and panel gaps were promoted into semantic.layout, while dead runtime-only layout helpers were removed from the token bridge. |
| 2026-04 | ADDED | Semantic mapping audit introduced as a report-first governance layer. Components and docs pages now get scored for direct primitive leaks, semantic space aliases were added for component/layout/section/sidebar usage, and sidebar typography aliases now own the nav / TOC voice.                           |

## 2026-05-01T21:15:48.000Z - fix(nav): strip DocLayout navSlot + tocSlot from all HDS doc pages
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                                                                       |
| -------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | typography                                                                                                                                                  |
| Change Pattern | typographic remap / hierarchy cleanup                                                                                                                       |
| Why It Matters | Improved documentation hierarchy so token and component guidance scan more quickly for designers and engineers.                                             |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral; documentation-shell and design-system surface refinement only.                                                                                     |
| System Effect  | Reduced via tighter semantic-tier alignment and clearer system-level presentation.                                                                          |
| Files          | `docs/ai/orchestration.json`, `src/app/pages/hds/FoundationDocPage.tsx`, `src/app/pages/hds/HdsSystemDocLayout.tsx`, `src/app/pages/hds/TypographyPage.tsx` |

### Intent & Execution

HDSLayout owns both the left sidebar and the right TOC rail at the
shell grid level. HdsSystemDocLayout, FoundationDocPage, and
TypographyPage were each passing redundant navSlot and tocSlot into
DocLayout, creating a double nav and a double TOC inside every HDS
route's content column.

Removed all three page-level TOC components (SystemPageToc,
FoundationPageToc, TypographyPageToc) and their associated imports
(useToc, useTocActiveId, HdsTocContext, useLocation, NavGroup,
NavItem, Text from TypographyPage). DocLayout.navSlot is already
optional from the prior commit; also made tocSlot optional with the
same null default.

Also added orchestration units:

- 12a-3: Clash Display medium/500 weight bump
- 12a-4: Brand blue swatch contrast fix on Color foundations page

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ------- | ----- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 2026-04 | ADDED | Semantic mapping audit introduced as a report-first governance layer. Components and docs pages now get scored for direct primitive leaks, semantic space aliases were added for component/layout/section/sidebar usage, and sidebar typography aliases now own the nav / TOC voice. |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Full token migration (phase 2a + 2b): all portfolio pages and shared components replaced hardcoded Tailwind color classes with HDS semantic tokens. Zero hardcoded hex values in component layer.                                                                                    |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Four new HDS components shipped (all token-compliant): Tag (component.tag._), Card (component.card._), Divider (semantic.color.border._), Input (component.input._). All documented across the HDS component family pages with live demos and token tables.                          |

## 2026-05-02T01:14:11.000Z - ci(github): 12i-quality-ci-pr-gates add Quality-gates workflow on PR
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                             |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | docs chrome                                                                                       |
| Change Pattern | docs chrome normalization                                                                         |
| Why It Matters | Reduced manual cleanup by standardizing the relevant design system surface.                       |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral.                                                                                          |
| System Effect  | Reduced via standardized system conventions.                                                      |
| Files          | `.github/workflows/quality.yml`, `docs/ai/orchestration.json`, `src/app/data/commit-history.json` |

### Intent & Execution

Closes the gap Pod B's audit surfaced: no existing workflow ran
typecheck, the canon validators, or the layout test suite on
pull_request. The broken HdsWebGLTriangleLogo import that motivated
the audit slipped through silently because nothing was checking.

The workflow mirrors the hardened husky pre-commit hook and adds
the layout test suite. validate-manifest and check-component-
completeness stay deferred until their backlogs clear.

Cherry-pick of Pod 5's work (worktree-agent-a74bd65b7ea3004f2 was
258 commits behind main so the workflow file was copied directly
rather than merged).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ------- | ----- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-04 | ADDED | Semantic mapping audit introduced as a report-first governance layer. Components and docs pages now get scored for direct primitive leaks, semantic space aliases were added for component/layout/section/sidebar usage, and sidebar typography aliases now own the nav / TOC voice.                           |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Component inventory tightened: shared navigation docs now focus on reusable links/cards while the shell footer pager is treated as layout-specific button composition. InlineCode remains documented under Display, and the Components index reflects the shared pieces actually owned by src/app/components/. |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Shadow and layout primitives were normalized into explicit namespaces (primitive.shadow._, primitive.breakpoint._, primitive.size._, primitive.grid._). Semantic/component tokens now alias upstream - no inline raw values anywhere in the system.                                                            |

## 2026-05-02T01:19:20.000Z - docs(typography): 12j-doc-typography hot-fix wrong family + heading weight in DESIGN/DESIGN-HANDOFF
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                                          |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Focus          | typography                                                                                                                     |
| Change Pattern | typographic remap / hierarchy cleanup                                                                                          |
| Why It Matters | Improved documentation hierarchy so token and component guidance scan more quickly for designers and engineers.                |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral; documentation-shell and design-system surface refinement only.                                                        |
| System Effect  | Reduced via tighter semantic-tier alignment and clearer system-level presentation.                                             |
| Files          | `DESIGN-HANDOFF.md`, `DESIGN.md`, `docs/ai/orchestration.json`, `scripts/build-design-md.mjs`, `scripts/generate-llms-txt.mjs` |

### Intent & Execution

Pod 2's doc-coherence audit flagged two P0 contradictions between
DESIGN.md / DESIGN-HANDOFF.md and the shipped tokens. Both are
top-of-funnel facts every AI agent reads first.

- Fixed: docs claimed "Atkinson Hyperlegible Next, no display fonts"
  but the token graph ships Clash Display (headings), Clash Grotesk
  (body), Geist Mono (mono). Updated scripts/build-design-md.mjs +
  DESIGN-HANDOFF.md with the correct three-family system.
- Fixed: docs claimed display / h1 / h2 are weight 300 (light) and
  h3 is 400 (regular). The 12a-3 token bump made all four weight
  500 (medium). Synced the docs.

Also: regenerated DESIGN.md, public/llms.txt, llms.txt via the
individual build scripts (pnpm tokens audit gate is pre-existing
baseline, not introduced here). Pod 1's elevation + card anatomy
sections in public/llms.txt are preserved — added them to
scripts/generate-llms-txt.mjs template so they survive future regen.

Mark 12j-doc-typography-font-family + 12j-doc-typography-heading-weight
as done with completedAt 2026-05-01 in orchestration.json.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Components and docs pages now get scored for direct primitive leaks, semantic space aliases were added for component/layout/section/sidebar usage, and sidebar typography aliases now own the nav / TOC voice.                           |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Font primitive audit confirmed the current semantic typography set uses every defined size, weight, lineHeight, and letterSpacing step. Shared page gutters, shell section pads, and panel gaps were promoted into semantic.layout, while dead runtime-only layout helpers were removed from the token bridge. |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Shadow and layout primitives were normalized into explicit namespaces (primitive.shadow._, primitive.breakpoint._, primitive.size._, primitive.grid._). Semantic/component tokens now alias upstream - no inline raw values anywhere in the system.                                                            |

## 2026-05-02T01:21:53.000Z - chore(ai): mark 3 Pod-2 false-positives denied + queue 12f-4 video-ingestion unit
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                       |
| -------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | docs chrome                                                                 |
| Change Pattern | docs chrome normalization                                                   |
| Why It Matters | Reduced manual cleanup by standardizing the relevant design system surface. |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral.                                                                    |
| System Effect  | Reduced via standardized system conventions.                                |
| Files          | `docs/ai/orchestration.json`                                                |

### Intent & Execution

Pod 2's broader doc-coherence audit (12j-doc-coherence cluster, 18
units) had ~50% false-positive rate at P0. Verified each P0 against
ground truth on 2026-05-01:

DENIED (false positives — do NOT execute):

- 12j-doc-deprecated-tokens-not-removed: 9 named tokens are NOT in
  tokens.css/tokens.ts. Doc rule is correct.
- 12j-doc-ghost-components-surface-grid: HdsSurface, Grid,
  HeadingStack, Dialog, Text all exist as files in
  src/app/components/. Doc rule is correct.
- 12j-doc-component-padding-value: --semantic-space-component-
  padding resolves to var(--primitive-space-6) = 24px in tokens.json.
  Doc claim is correct; Pod 2's 12px claim was a hallucination.

REMAINING REAL P0/P1s in 12j-doc-coherence (need execution):

- 12j-doc-dead-color-token-paths (DESIGN.md:17 says semantic.color.bg
  /text — those don't exist; real are surface/content)
- 12j-doc-ghost-token-component-inset (REACT_COMPONENTS.md:91 cites
  semantic.space.component.inset — real path is .padding)
- 12j-doc-registry-lucide-icon-library (registry has both Phosphor
  AND Lucide claims; codebase has both libraries imported — needs
  standardization, not just doc fix)
- ~12 P1/P2 units pending per-unit verification

QUEUED:

- 12f-4-video-motion-graphics-tool (proposed): companion to
  12f-2-page-clone-tool. Video → key-frame extraction (ffmpeg) →
  Claude Sonnet 4.6 motion analysis → HDS-compliant React with
  motion/react primitives. Dev CLI tool, not production feature.
  Per Adrian's request 2026-05-01.

Zero violations required before any component is marked shipped. |

| Field          | Value                                                                       |
| -------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | docs chrome                                                                 |

| Why It Matters | Reduced manual cleanup by standardizing the relevant design system surface. |

### Intent & Execution

Replaces the generic 'validation failed or Hermes error' abort note with
the actual tail of validationCmd stderr/stdout (last 12 lines, 500 chars).
Same captured output also feeds pod-runs.jsonl and the in-process console.

Why: Hermes was looping blindly on units it could not complete because
each abort produced an opaque message. Pod 10 had to manually diagnose
that 12o-perf-bundle-budget kept aborting due to a vite manualChunks
regression, after 5 silent retries. With richer abort notes the next
loop iteration sees the actual failure and can fix it.

runUnit now returns { ok, reason } instead of bool; main() threads the
reason into the abort note that revertClaim persists to agentNotes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| ------- | ----- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | ct() moved from DocSections to design-system/theme.ts - decoupled from doc layer.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Content and disabled treatments were remapped to solid semantic color roles so the docs and runtime surfaces read from the same color system instead of a separate transparency scale.                                                                                                                                                          |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Component documentation gate tightened: scripts/check-component-docs.mjs now treats every top-level shared React component in src/app/components/\*.tsx as doc-required by default, supports explicit @doc-exempt reasons for true internals, and runs inside the fast pre-commit lane so undocumented components cannot be quietly closed out. |

### Health Snapshot

| Metric               | Value                    | Source                                                     |
| -------------------- | ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| Direct Violations    | 3                        | [health-history.json](../src/app/data/health-history.json) |
| Snapshot Recorded At | 2026-05-02T08:15:39.969Z | [health-history.json](../src/app/data/health-history.json) |

Change vs previous snapshot: +3 direct violations.

browser install via pnpm exec playwright install --with-deps chromium.
