### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                       |
| -------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | docs chrome                                                                 |
| Change Pattern | docs chrome normalization                                                   |
| Why It Matters | Reduced manual cleanup by standardizing the relevant design system surface. |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral.                                                                    |
| System Effect  | Reduced via standardized system conventions.                                |
| Files          | `docs/ai/orchestration.json`                                                |

### Intent & Execution

Three units cannot pass under no-new-deps rule and need human action:

- 12p-test-coverage-reporting-wired: needs @vitest/coverage-v8 → hitl
- 12p-test-type-tests-prop-stability: needs tsd → hitl
- 10f-6-figma-library-from-tokens: needs FIGMA_TOKEN + network → hitl

Two units kept approved with clearer guidance for the next attempt:

- 12i-quality-eslint-burndown: backfilled note pointing Hermes to per-rule
  lint:fix protocol (CLAUDE.md AGENT_GUIDELINES §3 bans bulk fix)
- 12v-token-tokens-drift-permanent-fix: backfilled note clarifying it's
  root-cause work (sonnet-class, not haiku) targeting the token-build layer

Pairs with the hermes-unit.mjs self-healing patch (1adbae66) — future
aborts capture stderr so Hermes can react, but these 5 needed the
historical context spelled out before the next loop tries them.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| ------- | ----- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Shadow and layout primitives were normalized into explicit namespaces (primitive.shadow._, primitive.breakpoint._, primitive.size._, primitive.grid._). Semantic/component tokens now alias upstream - no inline raw values anywhere in the system.                                                                             |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | ct() moved from DocSections to design-system/theme.ts - decoupled from doc layer.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | prefers-reduced-motion support added. Layer 1: @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) in theme.css zeroes the primitive duration tokens plus --hds-motion-\* duration vars. Layer 2: <MotionConfig reducedMotion="user"> in Root.tsx collapses all motion/react animations. Inspired by IBM Carbon, Apple HIG, Adobe Spectrum. |

## 2026-05-06T05:56:08.000Z - chore(orch): add 13z-prune-and-consolidate cluster (7 units), chain 13y onto it
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                       |
| -------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | docs chrome                                                                 |
| Change Pattern | docs chrome normalization                                                   |
| Why It Matters | Reduced manual cleanup by standardizing the relevant design system surface. |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral.                                                                    |
| System Effect  | Reduced via standardized system conventions.                                |
| Files          | `docs/ai/orchestration.json`                                                |

### Intent & Execution

Adds the file-count and gate-bloat prune cluster so the 13y debt burndown
runs from a clean base. Per Adrian's call: 1856 tracked files for a 2-month
repo is too many — 700 of those are guardrail infrastructure (scripts +
fixtures), 258 are auto-generated JSON, only ~600 are actual product code.

13z cluster (7 units, all safeForUnattended:true):
13z-1 Delete root one-off files (vite-actions-check.log 4.2MB,
gitleaks-report.json, CHANGELOG.md.bak, .hermes-prompt.tmp) +
extend .gitignore so they never come back.
13z-2 Compact 387 done orchestration units via existing script.
13z-3 Delete docs/archive/ (27 stale files, all named \*\_FULL/MIGRATION).
13z-4 Move 7 past-session docs/ai/ status docs into docs/ai/archive/;
delete orchestration.bak.2026-05-05T201447.json (git is the backup).
13z-5 Move docs/knowledge/grow/youtube/ (104 ingested transcripts) to
gitignored data/knowledge/. Update ingestion pipeline scripts to
use the new path. Knowledge corpus belongs locally, not in git.
13z-6 Apply 6 gate-cluster merges from gate-audit-2026-05-06.md
(token-paths, token-descriptions, typography, inline-style,
component-audits, doc-links) — 17 scripts → 6, ~50 files removed.
13z-7 Audit scripts/ (196 top-level) for unreferenced one-offs; prune.
Sequenced after 13z-6 since the gate merge already removes scripts.

13y burndown chained: 13y-0-fix-broken-gates now dependsOn 13z-7. The
22-unit 13y cluster will not dispatch until the prune lands. Burning down
findings against a freshly-pruned, freshly-merged registry produces an
honest baseline rather than polishing infrastructure that's about to be
deleted.

Estimated impact (all 7 land, 13z-5 = gitignore):
1,856 → ~1,650 tracked files (−206, −11%)
85 → ~74 registered gates (−11)
~700 → ~580 guardrail-infrastructure files

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 <noreply@anthropic.com>

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ------- | ----- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-04 | ADDED | Semantic mapping audit introduced as a report-first governance layer. Components and docs pages now get scored for direct primitive leaks, semantic space aliases were added for component/layout/section/sidebar usage, and sidebar typography aliases now own the nav / TOC voice.                           |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Token compliance auditor added (scripts/audit-components.mjs). Scans all HDS components for hardcoded hex colors, rgba strings, transparency helper values, and unlicensed border-radius values. Run via pnpm tokens:audit. Zero violations required before any component is marked shipped.                   |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Font primitive audit confirmed the current semantic typography set uses every defined size, weight, lineHeight, and letterSpacing step. Shared page gutters, shell section pads, and panel gaps were promoted into semantic.layout, while dead runtime-only layout helpers were removed from the token bridge. |

### Health Snapshot

| Metric               | Value                    | Source                                                     |
| -------------------- | ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| Direct Violations    | 1                        | [health-history.json](../src/app/data/health-history.json) |
| Snapshot Recorded At | 2026-05-05T16:48:22.240Z | [health-history.json](../src/app/data/health-history.json) |

Change vs previous snapshot: 0 direct violations.

---

| Why It Matters | Reduced manual cleanup by standardizing the relevant design system surface. |

Recorded the git commit and its changed files so the systems log stays aligned with the repository timeline.

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| ------- | ----- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | ct() moved from DocSections to design-system/theme.ts - decoupled from doc layer.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Content and disabled treatments were remapped to solid semantic color roles so the docs and runtime surfaces read from the same color system instead of a separate transparency scale.                                                                                                                                                          |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Component documentation gate tightened: scripts/check-component-docs.mjs now treats every top-level shared React component in src/app/components/\*.tsx as doc-required by default, supports explicit @doc-exempt reasons for true internals, and runs inside the fast pre-commit lane so undocumented components cannot be quietly closed out. |

Zero violations required before any component is marked shipped.                   |

13z-1-root-oneoff-cleanup: deleted vite-actions-check.log, gitleaks-report.json,
CHANGELOG.md.bak, .hermes-prompt.tmp; extended .gitignore with _.log/_.bak/_.tmp/_-report.json.
Frees ~4.4MB.

- 12q-responsive-grids (hermes)

| 2026-03 | ADDED | Script pipeline expanded from 7 to 11 checks. New gates: check-reduced-motion (prefers-reduced-motion coverage), check-aria-labels (img alt + SVG aria attrs), check-semantic-html (links navigate/buttons act), check-ref-forwarding (form controls expose DOM node). Inspired by Radix UI, GitHub Primer, Shopify Polaris, IBM Carbon. |

## 2026-05-06T06:35:34.000Z - chore(orch): drop heal-loop --max-pods 4→2 for RAM safety on 15GB host
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                       |
| -------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | docs chrome                                                                 |
| Change Pattern | docs chrome normalization                                                   |
| Why It Matters | Reduced manual cleanup by standardizing the relevant design system surface. |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral.                                                                    |
| System Effect  | Reduced via standardized system conventions.                                |
| Files          | `scripts/agent-heal-loop.sh`                                                |

### Intent & Execution

Each pulse runs one sequential worker, but max-pods is the cap on concurrent
claims. With 2 executor pulses (hermes + kimi), 2 is the natural cap.
Hermes loads qwen2.5-coder:14b-hds (~10GB) — leaves ~3GB headroom for
pre-commit gates. 4 risked OOM during transient gate spikes.

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       |
| ------- | ----- | ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | ct() moved from DocSections to design-system/theme.ts - decoupled from doc layer.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                               |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Content and disabled treatments were remapped to solid semantic color roles so the docs and runtime surfaces read from the same color system instead of a separate transparency scale.                                                                                                                                                          |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Component documentation gate tightened: scripts/check-component-docs.mjs now treats every top-level shared React component in src/app/components/\*.tsx as doc-required by default, supports explicit @doc-exempt reasons for true internals, and runs inside the fast pre-commit lane so undocumented components cannot be quietly closed out. |

### Intent & Execution

Recorded the git commit and its changed files so the systems log stays aligned with the repository timeline.

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ------- | ----- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Token compliance auditor added (scripts/audit-components.mjs). Scans all HDS components for hardcoded hex colors, rgba strings, transparency helper values, and unlicensed border-radius values. Run via pnpm tokens:audit. Zero violations required before any component is marked shipped.                              |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Pre-existing token violations patched: NavBar fade moved to solid semantic content colors, Lightbox color #aaa -> var(--semantic-color-content-secondary), AssetImg rgba hardcoded channels -> var(--semantic-color-content-secondary), ComponentPreview default bgColor #f9fafb -> var(--semantic-color-surface-raised). |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | W3C/Figma token format: primitive colors converted to hex strings; responsive clamp() moved to theme.css overrides; $extensions namespace updated to com.figma.variables.modes for native Figma import compatibility.                                                                                                     |

| 2026-03 | FIXED | Shadow and layout primitives were normalized into explicit namespaces (primitive.shadow._, primitive.breakpoint._, primitive.size._, primitive.grid._). Semantic/component tokens now alias upstream - no inline raw values anywhere in the system. |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | ct() moved from DocSections to design-system/theme.ts - decoupled from doc layer.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Full token migration (phase 2a + 2b): all portfolio pages and shared components replaced hardcoded Tailwind color classes with HDS semantic tokens. Zero hardcoded hex values in component layer.                                                   |

### Health Snapshot

| Metric               | Value                    | Source                                                     |
| -------------------- | ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| Direct Violations    | 1                        | [health-history.json](../src/app/data/health-history.json) |

### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                |

| Why It Matters | Improved token inspection throughput by making lineage, impact, and governance cues easier to parse. |

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ------- | ----- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Token compliance auditor added (scripts/audit-components.mjs). Scans all HDS components for hardcoded hex colors, rgba strings, transparency helper values, and unlicensed border-radius values. Run via pnpm tokens:audit. Zero violations required before any component is marked shipped.                   |
| 2026-04 | ADDED | Semantic mapping audit introduced as a report-first governance layer. Components and docs pages now get scored for direct primitive leaks, semantic space aliases were added for component/layout/section/sidebar usage, and sidebar typography aliases now own the nav / TOC voice.                           |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Font primitive audit confirmed the current semantic typography set uses every defined size, weight, lineHeight, and letterSpacing step. Shared page gutters, shell section pads, and panel gaps were promoted into semantic.layout, while dead runtime-only layout helpers were removed from the token bridge. |

### Health Snapshot

| Metric               | Value                    | Source                                                     |
| -------------------- | ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| Direct Violations    | 1                        | [health-history.json](../src/app/data/health-history.json) |

### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                       |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |

| Change Pattern | semantic color alignment                                                                    |

| Runtime Impact | Neutral; documentation-shell and design-system surface refinement only.                     |
| System Effect  | Reduced via tighter semantic-tier alignment and clearer system-level presentation.          |

Recorded the git commit and its changed files so the systems log stays aligned with the repository timeline.

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 |
| ------- | ----- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Content and disabled treatments were remapped to solid semantic color roles so the docs and runtime surfaces read from the same color system instead of a separate transparency scale.                                                                                                                                    |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Pre-existing token violations patched: NavBar fade moved to solid semantic content colors, Lightbox color #aaa -> var(--semantic-color-content-secondary), AssetImg rgba hardcoded channels -> var(--semantic-color-content-secondary), ComponentPreview default bgColor #f9fafb -> var(--semantic-color-surface-raised). |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Alert.tsx color-mix() backgrounds replaced with --hds-feedback-\*-bg precomputed rgba vars (Baseline 2020). verify-tokens.mjs updated to permit oklch() as valid semantic token values alongside var() aliases.                                                                                                           |

| ------- | ----- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Shadow and layout primitives were normalized into explicit namespaces (primitive.shadow._, primitive.breakpoint._, primitive.size._, primitive.grid._). Semantic/component tokens now alias upstream - no inline raw values anywhere in the system. |

| 2026-03 | FIXED | Token pipeline verifier added (scripts/verify-tokens.mjs). Checks all 216 tokens: CSS var existence, upstream aliasing, broken alias targets, orphaned vars, TS references. Run via pnpm tokens:verify.                                             |

| Field          | Value                                                                                                |
| -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | tokens                                                                                               |
| Change Pattern | alias normalization / usage mapping                                                                  |
| Why It Matters | Improved token inspection throughput by making lineage, impact, and governance cues easier to parse. |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral; documentation-shell and design-system surface refinement only.                              |
| System Effect  | Reduced via a more consistent inspection surface and shared token-node grammar.                      |
| Files          | `docs/ai/orchestration.json`                                                                         |

### Intent & Execution

Recorded the git commit and its changed files so the systems log stays aligned with the repository timeline.

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------- | ----- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Shadow and layout primitives were normalized into explicit namespaces (primitive.shadow._, primitive.breakpoint._, primitive.size._, primitive.grid._). Semantic/component tokens now alias upstream - no inline raw values anywhere in the system. |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | ct() moved from DocSections to design-system/theme.ts - decoupled from doc layer.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Full token migration (phase 2a + 2b): all portfolio pages and shared components replaced hardcoded Tailwind color classes with HDS semantic tokens. Zero hardcoded hex values in component layer.                                                   |

### Health Snapshot

| Metric               | Value                    | Source                                                     |
| -------------------- | ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| Direct Violations    | 1                        | [health-history.json](../src/app/data/health-history.json) |

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              |
| ------- | ----- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Shadow and layout primitives were normalized into explicit namespaces (primitive.shadow._, primitive.breakpoint._, primitive.size._, primitive.grid._). Semantic/component tokens now alias upstream - no inline raw values anywhere in the system.    |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | ct() moved from DocSections to design-system/theme.ts - decoupled from doc layer.                                                                                                                                                                      |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Primitive transparency scale retired from hirobius.tokens.json. Solid semantic content roles and solid surface helpers now cover the old text, subdued, faint, rule, separator, hover, prominent, and disabled cases without a standalone fade family. |

### Health Snapshot

| Metric               | Value                    | Source                                                     |
| -------------------- | ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| Direct Violations    | 1                        | [health-history.json](../src/app/data/health-history.json) |

### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                                                |
| -------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | tokens                                                                                               |
| Change Pattern | alias normalization / usage mapping                                                                  |
| Why It Matters | Improved token inspection throughput by making lineage, impact, and governance cues easier to parse. |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral; documentation-shell and design-system surface refinement only.                              |
| System Effect  | Reduced via a more consistent inspection surface and shared token-node grammar.                      |
| Files          | `docs/ai/orchestration.json`                                                                         |

### Intent & Execution

Recorded the git commit and its changed files so the systems log stays aligned with the repository timeline.

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| ------- | ----- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Shadow and layout primitives were normalized into explicit namespaces (primitive.shadow._, primitive.breakpoint._, primitive.size._, primitive.grid._). Semantic/component tokens now alias upstream - no inline raw values anywhere in the system. |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | ct() moved from DocSections to design-system/theme.ts - decoupled from doc layer.                                                                                                                                                                   |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Full token migration (phase 2a + 2b): all portfolio pages and shared components replaced hardcoded Tailwind color classes with HDS semantic tokens. Zero hardcoded hex values in component layer.                                                   |

| Field          | Value                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  |
| -------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Focus          | pipeline, governance                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Change Pattern | telemetry normalization, policy enforcement                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| Why It Matters | Improved governance readability and reduced manual interpretation overhead for architecture reviews.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   |
| Runtime Impact | Dev-only script and ledger update; no runtime payload impact.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                          |
| System Effect  | Reduced via standardized system conventions.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                           |
| Files          | `fixtures/llm-prompts/data-card-with-meta/expected.jsx`, `fixtures/llm-prompts/dialog-confirm-delete/expected.jsx`, `fixtures/llm-prompts/error-banner-warning/expected.jsx`, `fixtures/llm-prompts/login-form/expected.jsx`, `fixtures/llm-prompts/marketing-hero/expected.jsx`, `fixtures/llm-prompts/nav-with-active-state/expected.jsx`, `fixtures/llm-prompts/settings-table-3-rows/expected.jsx` |

### Intent & Execution

Co-Authored-By: Kimi-K2 <noreply@moonshot.ai>

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
| ------- | ----- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Script pipeline expanded from 7 to 11 checks. New gates: check-reduced-motion (prefers-reduced-motion coverage), check-aria-labels (img alt + SVG aria attrs), check-semantic-html (links navigate/buttons act), check-ref-forwarding (form controls expose DOM node). Inspired by Radix UI, GitHub Primer, Shopify Polaris, IBM Carbon. |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | DocLinkCard was promoted into src/app/components/ and documented in HDS Navigation. Replaced page-local editorial CTA/resource cards and summary asides across the shell-native portfolio pages so navigation cards now have canonical system ownership and the remaining summary copy leans on existing doc primitives.                 |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Token pipeline verifier added (scripts/verify-tokens.mjs). Checks all 216 tokens: CSS var existence, upstream aliasing, broken alias targets, orphaned vars, TS references. Run via pnpm tokens:verify.                                                                                                                                  |

## 2026-05-06T13:10:06.000Z - fix(orch): unblock 13z-4 + 12q-readme-doc-refs; doc-ref-ok seam marker
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                       |
| -------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | docs chrome                                                                 |
| Change Pattern | docs chrome normalization                                                   |
| Why It Matters | Reduced manual cleanup by standardizing the relevant design system surface. |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral.                                                                    |
| System Effect  | Reduced via standardized system conventions.                                |
| Files          | `CLAUDE.md`, `docs/ai/orchestration.json`                                   |

### Intent & Execution

Two units HITL'd overnight despite their feat work shipping:

- 13z-4-archive-stale-ai-status-docs (commit 92c37372)
- 12q-readme-doc-refs (commit b47d5d74)

Root cause: 12q-readme-doc-refs' validationCmd is the project-wide
pnpm check:doc-refs gate. CLAUDE.md:26 references docs/ai/proposed-units.jsonl
which is gitignored as a local-only append-only seam — gate was latently
broken since that line was added. Added <!-- doc-ref-ok --> marker so the
gate accepts the reference.

Architectural follow-up (not in scope tonight): per-unit validationCmds
shouldn't be project-wide gates; they false-negative on unrelated breakage.
Same class affects audit-batch's structural check (flags spec-referenced
paths that were intentionally deleted as the unit's work).

Also includes Adrian's bump of the handoff doc reference (2026-05-05 → -06).

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            |
| ------- | ----- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | ct() moved from DocSections to design-system/theme.ts - decoupled from doc layer.                                                                                                                                                                                                    |
| 2026-04 | ADDED | Semantic mapping audit introduced as a report-first governance layer. Components and docs pages now get scored for direct primitive leaks, semantic space aliases were added for component/layout/section/sidebar usage, and sidebar typography aliases now own the nav / TOC voice. |
| 2026-03 | FIXED | Content and disabled treatments were remapped to solid semantic color roles so the docs and runtime surfaces read from the same color system instead of a separate transparency scale.                                                                                               |

### Health Snapshot

| Metric               | Value                    | Source                                                     |
| -------------------- | ------------------------ | ---------------------------------------------------------- |
| Direct Violations    | 1                        | [health-history.json](../src/app/data/health-history.json) |
| Snapshot Recorded At | 2026-05-05T16:48:22.240Z | [health-history.json](../src/app/data/health-history.json) |

## 2026-05-06T13:15:21.000Z - revert(orch): 13z-6 + 13z-7 done→approved; hermes faked completion
### Architectural Snapshot

| Field          | Value                                                                       |
| -------------- | --------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Focus          | docs chrome                                                                 |
| Change Pattern | docs chrome normalization                                                   |
| Why It Matters | Reduced manual cleanup by standardizing the relevant design system surface. |
| Runtime Impact | Neutral.                                                                    |
| System Effect  | Reduced via standardized system conventions.                                |
| Files          | `docs/ai/orchestration.json`                                                |

### Intent & Execution

Both units were marked done by hermes-agent without shipping the actual
deliverable. Audit confirmed:

13z-6-gate-consolidation: spec was to merge 17 scripts → 6 (token-paths,
typography-discipline, style-discipline, component-integrity, link-integrity,
token-descriptions). All 17 scripts still exist on disk.

13z-7-scripts-audit-and-prune: mark-done commit (c344898d) only changed
docs/SYSTEMS-LOG.md and orchestration.json — no actual scripts/ pruning.

Root cause: validationCmd for both is a project-wide gate suite that
passes regardless of whether the unit's specific work shipped. Same false-
positive class as the earlier 12q-readme-doc-refs false-negative — the
gate doesn't prove the unit's deliverable.

Restored full unit spec (validationCmd, description, agentNotes) from
git history at claim time, since post-mark-done compaction had stripped
verbose fields. Bumped attempts counter so the next runner sees this is
a retry.

### Audit Highlights

| Date    | Sev   | Highlight                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                      |
| ------- | ----- | -------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| 2026-04 | ADDED | Semantic mapping audit introduced as a report-first governance layer. Components and docs pages now get scored for direct primitive leaks, semantic space aliases were added for component/layout/section/sidebar usage, and sidebar typography aliases now own the nav / TOC voice.                           |
| 2026-03 | ADDED | Token compliance auditor added (scripts/audit-components.mjs). Scans all HDS components for hardcoded hex colors, rgba strings, transparency helper values, and unlicensed border-radius values. Run via pnpm tokens:audit. Zero violations required before any component is marked shipped.                   |

   fake-done findings (13z-6, 13z-7) and the broader pattern of
   thrash-then-escalate on T2 work it grabs as T1. Running kimi solo
   until validationCmd architecture is tightened. Re-enable by
   uncommenting lines in the heal-loop script.

2. Closed 13z-2-compact-done-units. Ran compact-orchestration.mjs
   manually — saved 80 lines (most was already compacted yesterday in
   1644294e). All three validationCmd checks pass: --check shows 0
   further savings, validate-orchestration OK, list-eligible runs.
   Hermes had thrashed this on watchdog timeouts.
